headline: Will VICI's (VICI) Eighth Straight Dividend Hike and Tenant Diversification Shift Its Income Narrative?
summary: VICI Properties recently delivered its eighth consecutive annual dividend increase since its 2018 IPO, now offering a yield well above the broader REIT sector, supported by long-term leases across 93 experiential properties and growing AFFO despite a prior EPS miss caused by a one-time accounting item. This pattern of steady dividend growth and resilient underlying cash flow, coupled with efforts to reduce tenant concentration ahead of the late-April earnings update, highlights how central...

headline: VICI Properties: A Winning High-Yield Bet To Buy Now
summary: VICI Properties has raised its dividend each year as a publicly traded company, and its tenants have never missed a rent payment. Read why VICI stock is a Buy.
